prompt: Cute cartoon bear, floating with paws stretched out, wearing space suit, soft pastel colors, rounded shapes, clean outline, kids game illustration style. Pose must read as mid-air floating/hovering (not standing on ground). BACKGROUND: solid plain white only (no gradients, no vignette, no texture). HARD CONSTRAINTS: character-only overlay asset, no space scenery (no stars, planets, rockets, nebula, moon, Earth), no motion lines unless extremely subtle and not implying environment; only bear + space suit. Keep consistent with the reference bear.
